last_completed_round.direction_name: Try the 256x128 hot-band CTA with 64x64 warp tiles on top of the proven K16 stage contract
last_completed_round.hypothesis: The corrected 128x128 K16 branch is our current best result, while the 128x128x32 branch proved that making the pipeline deeper is not enough and actually hurt active warps. That shifts the next priority toward the user's explicit tiling idea: a 256x128 CTA with the same 64x64 warp tile. This keeps the proven K16 double-buffer contract, keeps wide cp.async staging and shared-memory reuse intact, and increases the hot-band CTA to eight warps so the kernel can test whether more in-flight warps recover tensor issue without reopening the stage-race problem.

notes: Build passed for round 19/50. Node A will measure the result next.
